strings.panel.p1.narration.1.html: Though the player always wins now, Radd finds himself troubled.
strings.panel.p2.bubble.center.html: It's tough to sense time in the void, but I'd swear I'm spending longer here.
strings.panel.p3.bubble.center.html: Sigh, should I even care if there's more down time? The game's pointless anyway.
strings.panel.p4.bubble.center.html: It's not like playing good or bad changes anything. The game is always the same, and Sheena'll never really be my girlfriend.
strings.panel.p5.bubble.center.html: But even knowing that... the game's better than the void. It sure gets lonely here...
